nodes.title: Location
widgets_values:
variables:

  location_type:
    label: "Location Type"
    group: "Location" 
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: urban
        tags: [outdoor, city]
      - value: nature
        tags: [outdoor, nature]
      - value: coastal
        tags: [outdoor, nature, coastal]
      - value: indoor
        tags: [indoor]
      - value: fantasy realm
        tags: [outdoor, fantasy]
      - value: traditional
        tags: [outdoor, traditional]

  setting:
    label: "Setting"
    group: "Location"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      # urban
      - value: city street
        tags: [urban]
        when: "'city' in location_type_tags"
      - value: rooftop
        tags: [urban, elevated]
        when: "'city' in location_type_tags"
      - value: back alley
        tags: [urban, narrow]
        when: "'city' in location_type_tags"
      - value: train station platform
        tags: [urban]
        when: "'city' in location_type_tags"
      - value: shopping arcade
        tags: [urban, covered]
        when: "'city' in location_type_tags"
      # nature
      - value: forest path
        tags: [nature, enclosed]
        when: "'nature' in location_type_tags"
      - value: mountain overlook
        tags: [nature, elevated]
        when: "'nature' in location_type_tags"
      - value: riverbank
        tags: [nature, water]
        when: "'nature' in location_type_tags"
      - value: meadow
        tags: [nature, open]
        when: "'nature' in location_type_tags"
      # coastal
      - value: sandy beach
        tags: [coastal, open]
        when: "'coastal' in location_type_tags"
      - value: cliff overlooking the sea
        tags: [coastal, elevated]
        when: "'coastal' in location_type_tags"
      - value: seaside pier
        tags: [coastal, water]
        when: "'coastal' in location_type_tags"
      # indoor
      - value: cozy cafe
        tags: [indoor, warm]
        when: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: library
        tags: [indoor, quiet]
        when: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: bedroom
        tags: [indoor, intimate]
        when: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: school classroom
        tags: [indoor, school]
        when: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: cathedral interior
        tags: [indoor, grand]
        when: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      # fantasy
      - value: ancient ruins
        tags: [fantasy, outdoor]
        when: "'fantasy' in location_type_tags"
      - value: floating island
        tags: [fantasy, elevated]
        when: "'fantasy' in location_type_tags"
      - value: enchanted forest
        tags: [fantasy, nature]
        when: "'fantasy' in location_type_tags"
      # traditional
      - value: shrine steps
        tags: [traditional, elevated]
        when: "'traditional' in location_type_tags"
      - value: Japanese garden
        tags: [traditional, nature]
        when: "'traditional' in location_type_tags"
      - value: bamboo grove
        tags: [traditional, nature, enclosed]
        when: "'traditional' in location_type_tags"

  season:
    label: "Season"
    group: "Location"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: spring
        tags: [warm, bright, blooming]
        weight: 2
      - value: summer
        tags: [hot, bright]
        weight: 2
        unless: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: autumn
        tags: [cool, moody]
      - value: winter
        tags: [cold, dark]

  weather:
    label: "Weather"
    group: "Location"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: clear sky
        tags: [dry, bright]
        weight: 3
        unless: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: scattered clouds
        tags: [dry]
        weight: 2
        unless: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: overcast
        tags: [grey, dry]
        unless: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: light rain
        tags: [rainy, wet]
        unless: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: heavy rain
        tags: [rainy, wet, dramatic]
        unless: "'indoor' in location_type_tags or season == 'winter'"
      - value: snowfall
        tags: [snowy, cold]
        when: "season == 'winter' and 'outdoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: cherry blossoms drifting
        tags: [dry, magical, blooming]
        when: "season == 'spring' and 'outdoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: autumn leaves falling
        tags: [dry, magical]
        when: "season == 'autumn' and 'outdoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: indoor lighting
        tags: [dry, warm]
        when: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: golden mist
        tags: [dry, magical]
        when: "'fantasy' in location_type_tags"

  time_of_day:
    label: "Time of Day"
    group: "Location"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: dawn
        tags: [dim, cool_light]
        unless: "'indoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: morning
        tags: [bright, warm_light]
      - value: afternoon
        tags: [bright, warm_light]
      - value: golden hour
        tags: [warm_light, dramatic]
        weight: 2
      - value: dusk
        tags: [dim, warm_light, dramatic]
        weight: 2
      - value: night
        tags: [dark, cool_light]
      - value: midnight
        tags: [dark, cool_light]
        when: "'indoor' in location_type_tags or 'fantasy' in location_type_tags"

  lighting:
    label: "Lighting"
    group: "Location"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: soft natural light
        when: "'bright' in time_of_day_tags and 'dry' in weather_tags"
      - value: harsh midday sun
        when: "time_of_day == 'afternoon' and 'hot' in season_tags"
      - value: dappled sunlight through leaves
        when: "'nature' in setting_tags and 'bright' in time_of_day_tags"
      - value: golden hour rays
        when: "'warm_light' in time_of_day_tags and 'dramatic' in time_of_day_tags"
      - value: overcast diffused light
        when: "'grey' in weather_tags"
      - value: dramatic storm light
        when: "'dramatic' in weather_tags"
      - value: moonlight
        when: "'dark' in time_of_day_tags and 'outdoor' in location_type_tags"
      - value: warm cafe glow
        when: "setting == 'cozy cafe'"
      - value: candlelight
        when: "'indoor' in location_type_tags and 'dark' in time_of_day_tags"
      - value: neon reflections
        when: "'city' in location_type_tags and 'dark' in time_of_day_tags"
      - value: magical ambient light
        when: "'fantasy' in location_type_tags"
      - value: lantern light
        when: "'traditional' in location_type_tags and 'dark' in time_of_day_tags"

  location_notes:
    label: "Extra Location Notes"
    group: "Location"
    type: text

fragments:
  loc_weather_season: "{{ season }}{% if 'outdoor' in location_type_tags %}, {{ weather }}{% endif %}"
  loc_atmosphere: "{{ time_of_day }}, {{ lighting }}"
  location: "{{ setting }}, {{ fragment.loc_weather_season }}, {{ fragment.loc_atmosphere }}{% if location_notes %}, {{ location_notes }}{% endif %}"

nodes.title: Character Design
widgets_values:
variables:

  char_archetype:
    label: "Archetype"
    group: "Character"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: high school girl
        tags: [student, young]
      - value: office worker
        tags: [adult]
      - value: shrine maiden
        tags: [shrine, young]
      - value: idol
        tags: [young, performer]
      - value: knight
        tags: [adult, warrior]
      - value: mage
        tags: [adult, magical]

  hair_length: 
    label: "Hair Length"
    group: "Character"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: short hair
        tags: [short]
      - value: medium hair 
        tags: [medium]
        weight: 2 
      - value: long hair
        tags: [long]
        weight: 2
      - value: very long hair
        tags: [long, very_long]

  hair_color:
    label: "Hair Color"
    group: "Character"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: black hair
        weight: 3
      - value: brown hair
        weight: 2
      - value: blonde hair
        weight: 2
      - value: silver hair
      - value: white hair
      - value:
          - pink hair
          - blue hair
          - purple hair
        tags: [vivid]

  hair_style:
    label: "Hair Style"
    group: "Character"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: straight
      - value: wavy
      - value: twin tails
        when: "'long' in hair_length_tags"
      - value: ponytail
        when: "'long' in hair_length_tags or 'medium' in hair_length_tags"
      - value: braided
        when: "'long' in hair_length_tags"
      - value: bob cut
        when: "'short' in hair_length_tags or 'medium' in hair_length_tags"
      - value: messy bun
        when: "'long' in hair_length_tags or 'medium' in hair_length_tags"

  hair_accessory:
    label: "Hair Accessory"
    group: "Character"
    type: select
    count: 0-1
    options:
      - value: hair ribbon
        when: "'long' in hair_length_tags or 'medium' in hair_length_tags"
      - value: hair bow
        when: "'long' in hair_length_tags"
      - value: hair clip
      - value: flower hair pin
      - value: headband
        unless: "'very_long' in hair_length_tags"
      - value: miko hair ornament
        when: "'shrine' in char_archetype_tags"

  eye_color:
    label: "Eye Color"
    group: "Character"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: brown eyes
        weight: 3
      - value: blue eyes
        weight: 2
      - value: green eyes
      - value: grey eyes
      - value: amber eyes
      - value:
          - red eyes
          - violet eyes
          - golden eyes
        when: "'vivid' in hair_color_tags or 'shrine' in char_archetype_tags or 'magical' in char_archetype_tags"

  expression:
    label: "Expression"
    group: "Character"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - smiling
      - gentle smile
      - serious expression
      - value: determined expression
        when: "'warrior' in char_archetype_tags"
      - value: cheerful expression
        when: "'performer' in char_archetype_tags or 'student' in char_archetype_tags"
      - bashful
      - serene expression

  char_notes:
    label: "Extra Character Notes"
    group: "Character"
    type: text

fragments:
  char_hair: "{{ hair_color }}, {{ hair_length }}, {{ hair_style }}{% if hair_accessory %}, {{ hair_accessory }}{% endif %}"
  char_eyes: "{{ eye_color }}"
  character_design: "1girl, {{ char_archetype }}, {{ fragment.char_hair }}, {{ fragment.char_eyes }}, {{ expression }}{% if char_notes %}, {{ char_notes }}{% endif %}"
variables:

  char_archetype:
    label: "Archetype"
    group: "Character"
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - value: high school girl
        tags: [student, young]
      - value: office worker
        tags: [adult]
      - value: shrine maiden
        tags: [shrine, young]
      - value: idol
        tags: [young, performer]

      - smiling

      - value: determined expression

      - serene expression

  char_notes:
    label: "Extra Character Notes"
    group: "Character"
    type: text

fragments:
  char_hair: "{{ hair_color }}, {{ hair_length }}, {{ hair_style }}{% if hair_accessory %}, {{ hair_accessory }}{% endif %}"
  char_eyes: "{{ eye_color }}"
  character_design: "1girl, {{ char_archetype }}, {{ fragment.char_hair }}, {{ fragment.char_eyes }}, {{ expression }}{% if char_notes %}, {{ char_notes }}{% endif %}"

nodes.title: Power Prompt Positive Prompt
widgets_values:
includes:
  - action-pose.yaml

variables:
  sign_text:
    type: input
  art_style:
    type: select
    count: 1
    options:
      - anime
      - manga
      - cel shading
      - watercolor illustration
      - oil painting

  extra_tags:
    label: "Extra Tags"
    type: text

prompt: |
  masterpiece, best quality, detailed, safe, fully clothed,
  {{ fragment.character_design }},
  {{ fragment.location }},
  {{ art_style }},
  {{ fragment.pose_description }},
  {% if extra_tags %}{{ extra_tags }},{% endif %}
  holding as sign saying '{{ sign_text }}'

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: nsfw, worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, blurry, jpeg artifacts, sepia
